# md-comment

> Google Docs-style comments on GitHub-hosted markdown files.

md-comment lets you highlight text in any markdown file on GitHub and leave threaded comments. Comments are stored as JSON on an orphan branch (`md-comments`) in the same repo — no external database, fully portable, AI-readable.

## Web App

Paste a GitHub file URL after the app domain:

  https://md-comment.fly.dev/owner/repo/blob/branch/path/to/file.md

Or prepend the app URL to a full GitHub URL:

  https://md-comment.fly.dev/https://github.com/owner/repo/blob/branch/file.md

Sign in with GitHub OAuth. Select text and click "Add Comment" to comment.

If you don't have write access to the repo, you can fork it and comment on your fork.

## CLI

The CLI tool is at `cli/md-comment.sh`. It requires a GitHub token via `GITHUB_TOKEN` env var or `gh auth login`.

### Commands

  md-comment list <owner/repo> <file-path>
    List all comments on a file.

  md-comment add <owner/repo> <file-path> --text "selected text" --body "comment body"
    Add a comment anchored to the selected text.

  md-comment reply <owner/repo> <file-path> --comment-id <id> --body "reply text"
    Reply to an existing comment.

  md-comment resolve <owner/repo> <file-path> --comment-id <id>
    Resolve a comment thread.

## Comment Storage Format

Comments are stored on the `md-comments` orphan branch at:

  comments/<file-path>.comments.json

Each JSON file contains:

  {
    "metadata": {
      "repo": "owner/repo",
      "branch": "main",
      "filePath": "path/to/file.md",
      "url": "https://md-comment.fly.dev/owner/repo/blob/main/path/to/file.md"
    },
    "comments": [
      {
        "id": "uuid",
        "author": { "login": "username", "avatarUrl": "..." },
        "body": "Comment text",
        "anchor": {
          "selectedText": "the highlighted text",
          "startOffset": 100,
          "endOffset": 120,
          "contextBefore": "text before selection",
          "contextAfter": "text after selection",
          "commitSha": "abc123"
        },
        "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:00:00Z",
        "resolved": false,
        "replies": [
          {
            "id": "uuid",
            "author": { "login": "username", "avatarUrl": "..." },
            "body": "Reply text",
            "createdAt": "2025-01-01T00:01:00Z"
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19, TypeScript
- Auth.js v5 with GitHub OAuth
- Octokit for GitHub API
- SWR for data fetching
- Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui

## Source Code

https://github.com/zh3036/md-comment
